Show / Hide Table of Contents

Interface IAlertPanel

Describes an interface for a panel that displays alert windows.

The IAlertPanel interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Inherited Members
IComponent.Site
IComponent.Disposed
IDisposable.IsDisposed
IDisposable.Dispose()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.AlertPanels
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IAlertPanel : IComponent, IDisposable, IDisposable
Remarks

The IAlertPanel interface represents a UI component responsible for displaying alert windows to the user.

Instances of IAlertPanel are created using the CreatePanel() method.

The lifetime of an IAlertPanel instance is managed by the consumer. The consumer is responsible for disposing the panel when it is no longer needed.

Examples

The following example shows how to create and display an alert panel:

IAlertPanel alertPanel = alertPanelFactory.CreatePanel();
alertPanel.PanelTextClick += AlertPanel_PanelTextClick;
alertPanel.Show(this, "Main Form", "Learn more...");

private void AlertPanel_PanelTextClick(object sender, AlertPanelTextClickEventArgs e)
{
    //...
}

Properties

AllowHotTrack

Gets or sets whether alert window text is highlighted when hovered with the mouse.

Declaration
bool AllowHotTrack { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
Remarks

If enabled and the hot-tracked text is clicked, the PanelTextClick event is raised.

If disabled, clicking the alert text will not trigger the PanelTextClick event.

AllowHtmlText

Gets or sets whether HTML tags can be used to format the caption and text displayed in alert windows.

Declaration
bool AllowHtmlText { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
Remarks

If the AllowHtmlText property is enabled, you can use HTML tags to format an alert window’s caption and text.

AutoFormDelay

Gets or sets the delay, in milliseconds, before an alert window automatically closes.

Declaration
int AutoFormDelay { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int
Remarks

If the user does not hover over the alert window for the specified time, the window is automatically closed.

The user can prevent automatic closing by clicking the Pin button. The availability of this button is controlled by the ShowPinButton property.

AutoHeight

Gets or sets whether the height of alert windows is automatically calculated based on their content.

Declaration
bool AutoHeight { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

Buttons

Gets the collection of custom buttons displayed in alert windows.

Declaration
IButtonCollection Buttons { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IButtonCollection
Remarks

Custom buttons can be displayed at the bottom of alert windows. Add buttons to the Buttons collection to display them.

New buttons can be created using CreateButton(string).

ControlBoxPositionOnRight

Gets or sets whether the alert window control box appears on the right side.

Declaration
bool ControlBoxPositionOnRight { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

FormDisplaySpeed

Gets or sets the animation speed used when displaying alert windows.

Declaration
FormDisplaySpeed FormDisplaySpeed { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
FormDisplaySpeed
Remarks

Animation effects are defined by the HideAnimationType and ShowAnimationType properties.

FormLocation

Gets or sets the screen position where alert windows appear.

Declaration
FormLocation FormLocation { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
FormLocation

FormMaxCount

Gets or sets the maximum number of alert windows displayed simultaneously.

Declaration
int FormMaxCount { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int
Remarks

Alert windows are displayed using a FIFO queue. If more alerts are generated than allowed by this property, the additional alerts are queued and displayed once a visible alert window closes.

HideAnimationType

Gets or sets the animation effect used when an alert window is hidden.

Declaration
FormShowingEffect HideAnimationType { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
FormShowingEffect

ShowAnimationType

Gets or sets the animation effect used when an alert window appears.

Declaration
FormShowingEffect ShowAnimationType { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
FormShowingEffect

ShowCloseButton

Gets or sets whether a Close button is displayed in alert windows.

Declaration
bool ShowCloseButton { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

ShowPinButton

Gets or sets whether a Pin button is displayed in alert windows.

Declaration
bool ShowPinButton { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
Remarks

Clicking the Pin button keeps the alert window visible until it is unpinned.

ShowToolTips

Gets or sets whether tooltips are enabled for custom alert window buttons.

Declaration
bool ShowToolTips { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
Remarks

Tooltips can be specified using the Hint property.

Methods

Show(Form, IAlertPanelInfo, bool)

Displays an alert window displaying information from the specified IAlertPanelInfo.

Declaration
void Show(Form owner, IAlertPanelInfo info, bool autoWidth = false)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Form owner

An owner of the window. In a multi-monitor system, if the owner is set to null, the window will be displayed on the main monitor. Otherwise, the window will be displayed on the same monitor as the owner.
IAlertPanelInfo info

An IAlertPanelInfo object that contains settings used to initialize the newly created alert window.
bool autoWidth

Determines whether the width of the alert window is automatically adjusted to fit its content. The text will be displayed on a single line.

Show(Form, string, string, bool)

Displays an alert window with the specified caption and text.

Declaration
void Show(Form owner, string caption, string text, bool autoWidth = false)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Form owner

An owner of the window. In a multi-monitor system, if the owner is set to null, the window will be displayed on the main monitor. Otherwise, the window will be displayed on the same monitor as the owner.
string caption

A string that specifies the window’s caption.
string text

A string that specifies the window’s text, displayed when the text region is not hovered over.
bool autoWidth

Determines whether the width of the alert window is automatically adjusted to fit its content. The text will be displayed on a single line.
Remarks

If the AllowHtmlText property is enabled, you can use HTML tags to format an alert panel’s caption and text.

You can handle the BeforeFormShown event to customize the newly created alert window before its appearance on-screen.

Events

BeforeFormShown

Raised before an alert window is displayed, allowing customization of the window position and other settings.

Declaration
event EventHandler<PanelFormEventArgs> BeforeFormShown
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<PanelFormEventArgs>

ButtonClicked

Raised when a custom button within an alert window is clicked.

Declaration
event EventHandler<PanelButtonEventArgs> ButtonClicked
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<PanelButtonEventArgs>

ButtonDownChanged

Raised when the pressed state of a custom check button changes.

Declaration
event EventHandler<PanelButtonDownEventArgs> ButtonDownChanged
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<PanelButtonDownEventArgs>

FormClosing

Raised when an alert window is about to close.

Declaration
event EventHandler<PanelFormClosingEventArgs> FormClosing
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<PanelFormClosingEventArgs>

HyperLinkClicked

Raised when a hyperlink within the alert window is clicked.

Declaration
event EventHandler<HyperLinkClickedEventArgs> HyperLinkClicked
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<HyperLinkClickedEventArgs>

PanelFormLoad

Raised after an alert window has been created and allows customization of the panel and its buttons.

Declaration
event EventHandler<PanelFormLoadEventArgs> PanelFormLoad
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<PanelFormLoadEventArgs>

PanelTextClick

Raised when the text within an alert window is clicked.

Declaration
event EventHandler<AlertPanelTextClickEventArgs> PanelTextClick
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<AlertPanelTextClickEventArgs>

QueryFormWidth

Raised when the alert window queries its width.

Declaration
event EventHandler<PanelFormWidthEventArgs> QueryFormWidth
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<PanelFormWidthEventArgs>
